query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hours IS NOT NULL AND hours != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_horario,
  MAX(LENGTH(hours)) as max_hours_length
FROM establishments;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hours IS NOT NULL AND hours != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as com_horario,
  MAX(LENGTH(hours)) as max_hours_length
FROM establishments;
